step.name: register-the-flag
step.action: Add entry to flag registry: key, owner, created_at, expires_at, default_variant, variants. Mark is_kill_switch if risky.

step.name: wire-the-evaluation
step.action: Call flags.evaluate(key, context); branch on variant. Keep evaluation pure (no side effects).

step.name: queue-the-cleanup-pr
step.action: Open a draft PR that removes the flag branches and keeps the on-path. Assign to owner.

step.name: roll-out-progressively
step.action: Move % targeting from 1 → 10 → 50 → 100. Hold each step at least 1 hour with active monitoring.
step.decision-gate: If error rate or latency regresses at any step, flip back to previous % and triage. Do not advance until clean.

step.name: clean-up
step.action: Promote the cleanup PR from draft to merge-ready. Remove eval branches. Delete the registry entry.
